what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that associates a channel-memory entry with a board item via metadata.
observations: Contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Fields include id att-a944a585, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, target board://item-1426e820, and an ISO 8601 added timestamp.
The target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-1426e820.
conventions: Follows YAML frontmatter format with a leading and trailing ---.
Uses a hyphenated id and a namespaced board:// URI.
Records an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
concerns: File contains only identifiers and a timestamp with no explanatory context, author, or rationale.
No content clarifies why this board item is attached to the channel.
notes: A bare metadata stub linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-1426e820 as a board_items attachment.
questions: What does the board://item-1426e820 item represent?
Why was this board item attached to the dragnet-development channel?
What semantics does attachment_type board_items imply?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the metadata appears to serve as a link between a channel and a board item, which matches its structure.
intention_signals: The file seems intended to record that the dragnet-development channel has a board_items relationship to board item item-1426e820 at a specific point in time.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the target board item.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between a channel and a board item that a fused system can use to reconstruct channel-to-board relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger attachment named att-a944a585 linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-1426e820 with attachment_type board_items and an added timestamp.
